problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: If Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
